description_long: This is a traditional Chinese lantern with a spherical structure composed of interlocking red panels, forming a geometric floral pattern. The lantern features gold Chinese characters and intricate cut-out designs, particularly visible on the lower decorative tassel. A thin red hanging loop extends from the top, allowing it to be suspended from above. The body of the lantern is primarily red with gold accents, and the lower section includes a red tassel and an ornate, symmetrical cut-out medallion. The surface appears glossy and smooth, suggesting a combination of paper or thin plastic with metallic decorative elements. The lantern is lightweight and designed for festive or decorative use, often seen during celebrations such as Lunar New Year.
description: A glossy red spherical Chinese lantern with gold characters, floral cut-out patterns, and a decorative tassel, suspended by a thin loop. The surface is smooth and reflective, with intricate ornamental details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red spherical lantern, gold cut-out characters, and the ornate lower medallion with a tassel.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the interlocking red panels and partial visibility of the gold character and tassel.
description_view_2: Direct view of the lantern's face with the gold Chinese character prominently centered and the full decorative medallion below.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the geometric panel structure and partial gold character, with the tassel visible below.
